categories.name: Waterloo Plates of the Day
categories.subtitle: As a local pub we source responsibly & locally for our kitchen. Meat M. Redfearns Butchers, Buxton. Veg: Tomsons Buxton, Fish: R.G Morris Buxton.

items.name: The Waterloo Beef or Lamb Burger (GFA)
items.description: Derbyshire Beef burger or Longditch Farm lamb burger sourced locally with cheddar, smoked bacon & onion jam served with baby gem, tomato, house slaw and hand-cut chips.

items.name: Beer Battered Haddock and Chips (GFA)
items.description: Fresh haddock fillet in Waterloo ale batter with hand cut chips. Mushy peas and tartre sauce

items.name: Derbyshire Rib Eye Steak (GF)
items.description: 8oz Redfearn's with flat cap mushrooms, roasted tomato, hand cut chips and a homemade onion ring

items.name: Belly Pork (GF)
items.description: Served with butternut squash puree, dirty mash and fresh cider jus

items.name: Home made Derbyshire steak and ale pie
items.description: served with hand cut chips, salted butter peas and red cabbage,

items.name: Homemade Mature Cheddar and Onion Pie (V)
items.description: served with hand cut chips and a pot of gravy

items.name: Roast Butternut Squash & Red Pepper Patties in puff pastry parcels
items.description: served on a bed of rocket with tomoato and basil pesto

items.name: Wholesome Ham & Cheese chomper
items.description: Derbyshire ham, mature cheddar & wholegrain mustard mayo on a farmhouse bloomer

items.name: Brie & Cranberry Ciabatta
items.description: Peak brie, house cranberry chutney & rocket on a rustic ciabatta

items.name: Beef & Blue Ciabatta
items.description: Derbyshire Beef mixed with rich gravy, Peak Blue & onion jam on a toasted ciabatta

items.name: The Ultimate Fish Goujon
items.description: Chunky battered fish goujon, rocket in a toasted brioche

items.name: The Waterloo Chip Butty
items.description: Triple-cooked beef dripping chips, Peak cheddar & house onion gravy in a toasted brioche

items.name: Vegan Roast Pepper & Pesto Ciabatta
items.description: Roasted red pepper with Vegan Cheese, Spinach & Vegan Basil Pesto in a Warm Ciabatta

items.name: Waterloo Corn Ribs (VE/GF)
items.description: Delicious bitesize cornribs fried crisp and dusted with our Waterloo seasoning served with chilli dip. Great as a starter or on their own a a nibble !

items.name: Venison Pate
items.description: Served with sourdough bread, dressed mixed leaves and onion chutney

items.name: Crispy Whitebait
items.description: Lightly floured whitebait fried until golden served with lemon mayo and charred lemon

items.name: Baked Feta with Honey (V)
items.description: Warm feta drizzled with honey served with pita bread to dip. Delicious as a starter or just to nibble !

items.name: Hartington Cheese Board for one with Chutney, Pickles & Crackers
Sticky Toffee Pudding
items.description: Waterloo-made date sponge with butterscotch sauce & vanilla ice cream

items.name: Apple & Berry Crumble
items.description: Local fruit under a buttery oat crumble with custard or cream

items.name: Baked Vanilla Cheesecake
items.description: Classic baked cheesecake with berry compote & whipped cream

items.name: Boston Chocolate Brownie
items.description: A moist chocolate fudge brownie topped with loads of dark chocolate chips served with ice cream

items.name: Parkin Ginger Cake
items.description: Parkin is a gingerbread cake traditionally made with oatmeal and black treacle served with ice cream

items.name: Hartington Cheeseboard
items.description: A selection of Hartington cheeses served with chutney, pickles & crackers

allergenNote: Please ask a member of staff about allergens. We cater for dietary requirements where possible.
